## Type of Change
<!-- Mark the relevant options with an "x" -->
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Configuration or infrastructure change
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Refactoring (code restructuring without behavior change)

## Code Quality Checklist
- [ ] Code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] flake8 linting passed (Python)
- [ ] black formatting applied (Python)
- [ ] isort import sorting applied (Python)
- [ ] ESLint checks passed (JavaScript)
- [ ] Prettier formatting applied (JavaScript)
- [ ] Type checks pass (mypy for Python, TypeScript for JS)
- [ ] Security scan passed (bandit for Python)
- [ ] No new warnings introduced

## API & Documentation
- [ ] API endpoint changes documented (OpenAPI/Swagger)
- [ ] New endpoints have proper documentation
- [ ] Breaking API changes clearly communicated
- [ ] Database migrations included (if schema changed)
- [ ] Database migrations tested
- [ ] Docs updated (README, guides, etc.)
- [ ] Architecture diagrams updated (if applicable)

## Security & Compliance
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data committed
- [ ] Security implications reviewed
- [ ] VARA compliance impact assessed (if applicable)
- [ ] No dependency vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] SQL injection prevention verified (if database queries modified)
- [ ] OWASP best practices followed

## Performance
- [ ] No performance regressions introduced
- [ ] Latency implications assessed (especially for AI inference)
- [ ] Memory usage impact evaluated
- [ ] Database query efficiency verified (if queries modified)
- [ ] Caching strategy reviewed (if applicable)

## Deployment
- [ ] Backward compatible (or breaking changes documented)
- [ ] Database migration strategy clear
- [ ] Environment variables documented (if new ones added)
- [ ] No manual migration steps required
- [ ] Rollback strategy documented

## AI Model Impact (if applicable)
- [ ] Model behavior unchanged or improvements documented
- [ ] Drift detection thresholds reviewed
- [ ] Feature drift impact assessed
- [ ] Explainability impact considered

## Blockchain & Reserve Verification Impact (if applicable)
- [ ] Reserve ratio verification not affected
- [ ] Merkle tree generation performance acceptable
- [ ] Blockchain API integration stable
- [ ] Reconciliation variance monitored
